title: Decadent Greek Pasta Lasagna
description: A romantic, earthy Greek pastitsio made with smoky tomato sauce and creamy béchamel, enriched by vegetable stock and aromatic herbs.
instructions: Cook pasta shells in a large pot of salted boiling water until al dente, then drain and set aside.
In a skillet, melt 30g of butter over medium heat and sauté diced onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add smoked paprika and tomato paste to the skillet, stirring until fragrant, then pour in vegetable stock and bring to a simmer.
Whisk in all-purpose flour, stirring until the mixture thickens into a roux, then gradually whisk in milk until smooth.
Stir in ricotta and mozzarella cheeses, season with salt and pepper, and simmer the sauce for five minutes.
Beat eggs in a bowl, then temper them by slowly whisking in a splash of the béchamel, after which combine them back into the pan.
Layer half of the cooked pasta in a greased baking dish, pour half of the sauce over it, then repeat with remaining pasta and sauce.
Sprinkle the remaining mozzarella cheese on top to create a golden crust.
Bake the lasagna for 25 minutes until bubbling and golden brown.
Allow the dish to rest for ten minutes before slicing.
Garnish with fresh parsley if desired and serve warm.
